recommendations.title: The Secret Diary of an Exchange Student
recommendations.overview: Two best friends embark on a life-changing adventure abroad as exchange students.

recommendations.title: Rich in Love
recommendations.overview: Working incognito at his rich dad's company to test his own merits, Teto falls for Paula and tells her he grew up poor, a lie that spins out of control.

recommendations.title: DJ Cinderella

recommendations.title: Punch-Drunk Love
recommendations.overview: A socially awkward and volatile small business owner meets the love of his life after being threatened by a gang of scammers.

recommendations.title: LOL Surprise: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Dazzling doll sisters Queen Bee and Royal Bee make their first movie with help from their fashionable friends in this one-of-a-kind magical adventure.

recommendations.title: X+Y
recommendations.overview: A socially awkward teenage math prodigy finds new confidence and new friendships when he lands a spot on the British squad at the International Mathematics Olympiad.

recommendations.title: Do Revenge
recommendations.overview: A dethroned queen bee at a posh private high school strikes a secret deal with an unassuming new student to enact revenge on one another’s enemies.

recommendations.title: The French Kissers
recommendations.overview: An awkward adolescent boy and his angst-ridden friends try their best to fit in amongst a cast of varied characters.

recommendations.title: Back to the Outback
recommendations.overview: Tired of being locked in a reptile house where humans gawk at them like they are monsters, a ragtag group of Australia’s deadliest creatures plot an escape from their zoo to the Outback, a place where they’ll fit in without being judged.
